hooks.command: cd "$(git -C "$PWD" rev-parse --show-toplevel 2>/dev/null || echo "$PWD")" && git diff --quiet && git diff --cached --quiet && [ -z "$(git ls-files --others --exclude-standard)" ] || (git add -A && git commit -m "chore: auto-commit $(date '+%Y-%m-%d %H:%M')" && git push 2>/dev/null || true)
